About QUREIT

15 Years of Excellence in Pest Control

Our Story

Since 2011, QUREIT Pest Control LLC has been the trusted name in pest management across the Philippines. What started as a small operation has grown into one of the region's most respected pest control companies, serving over 1,000 satisfied clients.

We built our reputation on a foundation of reliability, professionalism, and environmental responsibility. Our team of certified technicians brings decades of combined experience to every job, ensuring that your pest problems are solved effectively and safely.

Today, we serve a diverse clientele including luxury hotels, restaurants, hospitals, corporate offices, and residential properties, always maintaining our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Our Core Values

These principles guide everything we do and define who we are as a company.

🛡️

Safety First

We prioritize the safety of your family, pets, and the environment in all our treatments.

🏆

Excellence

We maintain the highest standards of service quality and professionalism in every job.

👥

Customer Focus

Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we're not done until you're completely happy.

🎯

Innovation

We continuously adopt the latest technologies and methods to serve you better.

Why Choose QUREIT?

✓

Eco-Friendly Solutions

We use environmentally responsible products and methods that are safe for your family and the planet.

✓

Certified Professionals

Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest pest control techniques.

✓

Guaranteed Results

We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and guarantee your satisfaction.

✓

24/7 Support

Pest emergencies don't follow a schedule. We're available whenever you need us.

✓

Customized Solutions

Every property is unique. We create tailored pest management plans for your specific needs.

✓

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, upfront pricing for all our services.

QURE IT

We are a highly-accredited, reliable, socially-relevant, and environmentally conscious provider of pest control services that has been protecting our clients from pests for 15 years.
